title: fix(langchain): propagate RunnableConfig in create_agent model execution
body_text:
This PR fixes an issue where `astream_events` failed to capture `on_chat_model_stream` events when using `create_agent`.

Previously, the `RunnableConfig` was dropped during the model execution step in `_execute_model_sync` and `_execute_model_async`, causing the underlying chat model to run without the parent callback context. This resulted in streaming responses appearing as "all-at-once" chunks because the token-level events were lost.

**Changes:**
- Updated `ModelRequest` in `langchain/agents/middleware/types.py` to accept and store an optional `config: RunnableConfig`.
- Updated `model_node` and `amodel_node` in `langchain/agents/factory.py` to capture the runtime `config` and pass it to `ModelRequest`.
- Updated `_execute_model_sync` and `_execute_model_async` to pass `request.config` when calling `model.invoke()` / `model.ainvoke()`.

entities.description: A function designed to capture and stream events.

entities.description: Specific events generated during chat model streaming.

entities.description: A configuration object used to pass runtime settings in LangChain.

entities.name: _execute_model_sync
entities.description: A synchronous internal function for executing a model.

entities.name: _execute_model_async
entities.description: An asynchronous internal function for executing a model.

entities.name: Chat Model
entities.description: The underlying language model used for chat interactions.

entities.name: ModelRequest
entities.description: A data structure used to encapsulate model execution requests.

entities.name: model_node
entities.description: A component within the agent factory responsible for model processing.

entities.name: amodel_node
entities.description: An asynchronous component within the agent factory responsible for model processing.

entities.name: model.invoke()
entities.description: A synchronous method to call or execute a model.

entities.name: model.ainvoke()
entities.description: An asynchronous method to call or execute a model.

entities.name: Lost Token-level Events
entities.description: The issue where individual token generation events are not captured during streaming.

entities.name: All-at-once Chunks
entities.description: Streaming responses that appear as complete messages rather than incremental tokens.

entities.name: Parent Callback Context
entities.description: The necessary context for callback functions to correctly process events.

extracted_data.summary: This PR fixes an issue where astream_events failed to capture on_chat_model_stream events when using create_agent due to RunnableConfig not being propagated during model execution, leading to lost token-level events and 'all-at-once' streaming responses.
